parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT u.id AS user_id, c.id AS company_id, c.company_name, smt.platform, smt.target_identifier FROM public.social_monitoring_targets smt JOIN public.companies c ON c.id = smt.company_id JOIN auth.users u ON u.id = smt.user_id WHERE smt.is_active = true AND smt.platform IN ('g2', 'reddit', 'capterra') ORDER BY u.id, c.company_name;

SELECT i.source_url FROM winloss.indicators i WHERE i.user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid AND i.company_name = '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND i.detected_at >= now() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY i.detected_at DESC LIMIT 200;

INSERT INTO winloss.indicators (user_id, indicator_type, company_name, company_id, reason, source_url, source_platform, sentiment_score, raw_snippet, detected_at, meta) SELECT '{{ $json.user_id }}'::uuid, 'loss', '{{ $json.company_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.company_id ? "'" + $json.company_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }}, '(pending classification)', '{{ $json.scrape_url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', 0, '(raw content pending)', now(), '{"status": "pending_classification"}'::jsonb ON CONFLICT (user_id, source_url) DO NOTHING RETURNING id;
